name: 🚀 Expansion Vector (Feature Request)
about: Propose a design iteration, optimization, or new functional module.
title: 'feat: [Short feature name]'
labels: enhancement, planning
assignees: Stormynubee
---

```text
[ SYSTEM STATUS: READY TO EXPAND ]
```

### 🎯 Objective & Value Vector
Explain the goal of this expansion. How does it improve the user experience, enhance local performance, or polish visual aesthetics?

### 🛠️ Proposed Technical Design
Provide details on how you envision this feature being integrated (e.g. state management changes, new component modules, or database schema additions).

### 📐 Alternative Vectors considered
Describe any other alternative technical approaches or layouts you researched, and why they were bypassed.

---
*Building the future, one block at a time.*
